description_long: This helmet features a smooth, rounded dome with a pronounced vertical ridge running from the top to the base of the front. The front face is defined by a distinctive T-shaped visor cutout, reminiscent of Mandalorian-style helmets, providing a bold and iconic silhouette. The sides are solid and extend downward, partially covering the ears, while the rear is fully enclosed and curves gently to follow the shape of the head. The surface appears to be made of a dark, matte metal or composite material, with no visible graphics, logos, or ventilation openings. The helmet lacks any external attachments, fasteners, or visible retention systems, giving it a seamless and monolithic appearance. The overall design suggests a focus on protection and anonymity, suitable for urban environments where robust headgear is required.
description: A dark, matte, rounded helmet with a T-shaped visor cutout and no visible graphics or vents, evoking a Mandalorian style. The design is seamless, fully enclosing the head for maximum protection.
description_view_0: Front view shows the prominent T-shaped visor cutout and the central ridge running vertically down the helmet.
description_view_1: Front-side view reveals the helmet's smooth curvature and the solid, ear-covering side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the fully enclosed, rounded back with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Rear-side view highlights the helmet's continuous, unbroken surface and the downward extension over the ears.
